name: Stir-Fried Pork
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Boneless pork, cut into thin strips
3 cups Cut vegetables (such as carrots, broccoli, and water chestnuts)
recipeInstructions:
-------------
1. Combine the pork, 1 tablespoon Teriyaki sauce, and crushed red pepper in a bowl; set aside.
2. Mix together the cornstarch, remaining 3 tablespoons Teriyaki sauce, white vinegar, and water in another bowl; set aside.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Stir-fry the pork mixture until the pork is no longer pink, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
5. Add another tablespoon of oil to the wok or skillet. Stir-fry the vegetables until they are crisp-tender.
6. Return the pork to the wok. Add the cornstarch mixture and salt; stir until the mixture boils, about 2 more minutes.
